configEntries.description: npm executable used for project package checks and upgrades.

scripts.name: Check npm Project Updates
scripts.description: Checks one npm project and emits stable dashboard parser lines.

steps.label: Check npm project updates
steps.command:
npm_cmd="{{config.npmCommand}}"
project_path="{{config.projectPath}}"
[ -n "$npm_cmd" ] || npm_cmd=npm
case "$project_path" in "~/"*) project_path="$HOME/${project_path#??}" ;; esac
cd "$project_path"
out="$($npm_cmd outdated --json 2>/dev/null || true)"
printf '%s' "$out" | node -e 'let s=``;process.stdin.on(`data`,d=>s+=d);process.stdin.on(`end`,()=>{if(!s.trim())return;const o=JSON.parse(s);for(const n of Object.keys(o)){const p=o[n]||{};if(p.current&&p.latest&&p.current!==p.latest)console.log(`LUDASH_UPDATE ${n} ${p.current} ${p.latest}`)}})'

scripts.name: Detect npm Project
scripts.description: Checks whether npm and the configured package.json are available.

steps.label: Detect npm project
steps.command:
npm_cmd="{{config.npmCommand}}"
project_path="{{config.projectPath}}"
[ -n "$npm_cmd" ] || npm_cmd=npm
case "$project_path" in "~/"*) project_path="$HOME/${project_path#??}" ;; esac
command -v "$npm_cmd" >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ -f "$project_path/package.json" ] && echo found

scripts.name: List Installed npm Project Packages
scripts.description: Reports direct npm project dependencies for package inventory.

steps.label: List npm project packages
steps.command:
npm_cmd="{{config.npmCommand}}"
project_path="{{config.projectPath}}"
[ -n "$npm_cmd" ] || npm_cmd=npm
case "$project_path" in "~/"*) project_path="$HOME/${project_path#??}" ;; esac
cd "$project_path"
out="$($npm_cmd ls --depth=0 --json 2>/dev/null || true)"
printf '%s' "$out" | node -e 'let s=``;process.stdin.on(`data`,d=>s+=d);process.stdin.on(`end`,()=>{if(!s.trim())return;const o=JSON.parse(s);const deps=o.dependencies||{};for(const n of Object.keys(deps)){const v=deps[n]&&deps[n].version;if(v)console.log(`LUDASH_PACKAGE ${n} ${v}`)}})'

scripts.name: Update All npm Project Packages
scripts.description: Runs npm update in the configured project directory.

steps.label: Update npm project packages
steps.command:
npm_cmd="{{config.npmCommand}}"
project_path="{{config.projectPath}}"
[ -n "$npm_cmd" ] || npm_cmd=npm
case "$project_path" in "~/"*) project_path="$HOME/${project_path#??}" ;; esac
cd "$project_path"
out="$($npm_cmd outdated --json 2>/dev/null || true)"
printf '%s' "$out" | node -e 'let s=``;process.stdin.on(`data`,d=>s+=d);process.stdin.on(`end`,()=>{if(!s.trim())return;const o=JSON.parse(s);for(const n of Object.keys(o))console.log(n)})' | while IFS= read -r pkg; do
  [ -n "$pkg" ] && $npm_cmd install "${pkg}@latest"
done

scripts.name: Update Selected npm Project Packages
scripts.description: Installs the selected npm project packages at their latest matching versions.

steps.label: Update selected npm project packages
steps.command:
npm_cmd="{{config.npmCommand}}"
project_path="{{config.projectPath}}"
[ -n "$npm_cmd" ] || npm_cmd=npm
case "$project_path" in "~/"*) project_path="$HOME/${project_path#??}" ;; esac
cd "$project_path"
for pkg in {{quotedPackages}}; do
  $npm_cmd install "${pkg}@latest"
done
